title: schizachyrium tenerum var. scabriglume
intro: Schizachyrium tenerum var. scabriglume, also known as the scabriglume little bluestem, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family, native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of this plant are not well-documented, but it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Some potential health benefits of Schizachyrium tenerum var. scabriglume include its possible use in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. However, its herbal preparations and uses are not well-established, and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential applications.
